title: Marketing consulting
description: We analyze goals, channels, offers, funnel and growth points.

content.heading: What we do
content.text: We analyze goals, channels, offers, funnel and growth points. This page can later be expanded with a specific offer, examples and project details.

content.heading: When it fits
content.text: When you need not just a separate element, but a clear working system for a business, client or internal team task.

content.heading: What to prepare
content.text: A short task description, links to current materials, examples, limits, deadlines and the desired result. If you do not have this yet, we start with a consultation.
